```{r}
#| label: bw-figure
#| fig-cap: "Distribution of birth weights of the infants included in this report. A is a histogram in 50 g steps with a density curve of your own unit's data and a density curve of the reference data and B are tow boxplots, one of your own unit's data and one of the reference data. Vertical lines in the boxplot represent the 25%, 50% and 75% quantiles, the diamond represents the pooled arithmetic mean."
label_bw <- function(x) paste(format(x, big.mark =" "), "g", sep = " ")
breaks_bw <- function(x) pretty(x, as.integer((as.integer(x[2]) + 1 - as.integer(x[1])) / 100))
NeoIPC_pallette <- c("#FF9015","#0083C1","#0D4F6C","#E6FAFC","#E0D3DE","#1F271B")
pal <- c(NeoIPC_pallette[5],NeoIPC_pallette[2],NeoIPC_pallette[6])

pdq <- data$patients$birth_weight |>
  quantile(seq(0.25, 0.75, 0.25)) |>
  unname()
mean_bw <-data$patients$birth_weight |>
  mean()
bw_scale_min <- min(c(as.integer(min(data$patients$birth_weight) / 50L) * 50L - 50L, ref_data$birth_weight$scale$min))
bw_scale_max <- max(c(as.integer(max(data$patients$birth_weight) / 50L) * 50L + 100L, ref_data$birth_weight$scale$max))

histogram_data <- data$patients |>
  mutate(
    bw50 = neoipcr:::bw50(birth_weight, as_factor = F)
    ) |>
  group_by(bw50) |>
  summarise(n = n())

bw_d <- data$patients$birth_weight |>
  neoipcr:::bw50(as_factor = F) |>
  density(from = bw_scale_min, to = bw_scale_max)

density_data <- data.frame(
      bw50 = bw_d$x,
      density = bw_d$y / sum(bw_d$y))

density_factor <- sum(histogram_data$n) * (nrow(density_data) / nrow(histogram_data))

boxplot_data <- data.frame(
  Database = factor(c('Own department','Reference data')),
  q1 = c(pdq[1], ref_data$birth_weight$q1),
  q2 = c(pdq[2], ref_data$birth_weight$q2),
  q3 = c(pdq[3], ref_data$birth_weight$q3),
  mean = c(mean_bw, ref_data$birth_weight$mean)
)

A_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_col(data = histogram_data, aes(x=bw50, y=n, colour = "own"), fill = "white") +
  geom_line(data = ref_data$birth_weight$density, aes(x=bw50, y=density * density_factor, colour = "ref")) +
  geom_line(data = density_data, aes(x=bw50, y=density * density_factor, colour = "own")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = breaks_bw) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = rev(pal[2:3])) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(bw_scale_min, bw_scale_max)) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()) +
  labs(tag = "A")

B_plot <- ggplot(boxplot_data, aes(Database, colour = Database)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(ymin = q1, lower = q1, middle = q2, upper = q3, ymax = q3),
    stat = "identity",
    outlier.shape = NA,
    ) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mean), shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_bw, labels = label_bw) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = rev(pal[2:3])) +
  coord_flip(ylim = c(bw_scale_min, bw_scale_max)) +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()) +
  labs(tag = "B")

A_plot / B_plot
```
